category_sources: Official GitHub README describes wxLua as Lua bindings for the wxWidgets cross-platform GUI toolkit.
source_facts.description says wxLua provides Lua bindings for wxWidgets.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub documentation and manual use wxLua capitalization.
source_facts.homepage is the official pkulchenko/wxlua repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README Documentation section links the user manual, FAQ, install guide, change history, and binding-generation docs.
Official user manual describes wxLua 3.2.0.2 and its Lua/wxWidgets binding model.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pkulchenko/wxlua, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says wxLua supports Lua 5.1 through 5.4, LuaJIT, and wxWidgets 3.x.
source_facts.description identifies Lua bindings for wxWidgets.
